overview: Frost Skeleton Guardman is a Normal-class Undead monster found in Ice Abyss, Ice Cavern. 1 grades: Common. Base stats (Common): 52 HP, 22 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 6. 5 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack1 at 160% ratio (352 base damage). combat radius 125.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 5 melee attacks. Attack1 (160%), Attack2 (130%), Attack4 Counter (150%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Fire, Divine, Earth
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-2500), Divine (-2000), Earth (-3000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 125, ability check distance 200
strategies.description: Combat area radius 125. Ability check distance 200. Ability attack delay: 1.5s.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
